issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.
Skill is vendor-locked to Cloudflare Workers and Wrangler CLI, not cross-platform.

scenarios.name: shop-db-with-products-endpoint
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most rubric items but omits migrations, while Response B uses migrations but fails to use env.DB.prepare(...).bind(...).all() in the Worker.

scenarios.name: drizzle-orm-user-posts-api
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most of the rubric but uses a different insertion method than required, while Response B provides no content.
